metadata.title: Custom Jewelry Design | Layan Jewellery
metadata.description: Design your own ring or gold and diamond piece at Layan Jewellery. Consultation, material selection, precise execution, and delivery of a unique piece that suits you.

subtitle: Share your idea and our master craftsmen will bring it to life with precision and artistry.

form.title: Tell Us About Your Dream Piece
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe your dream piece in detail...
form.success: Your custom design request has been submitted successfully! We'll get back to you soon.

services.title: What We Offer
services.subtitle: From consultation to creation, we provide a complete custom jewelry experience tailored to your vision.

engagementRings.title: Engagement Rings
engagementRings.description: Custom-designed engagement rings that capture your unique love story.

weddingRings.title: Wedding Bands
weddingRings.description: Matching wedding bands crafted to symbolize your eternal commitment.

customNecklaces.title: Custom Necklaces
customNecklaces.description: Bespoke necklaces and pendants designed to your exact specifications.

redesignJewelry.title: Jewelry Redesign
redesignJewelry.description: Transform heirloom pieces into modern treasures you'll love to wear.

goldSelection.title: Gold Selection
goldSelection.description: Expert guidance in selecting the perfect gold and gemstones for your piece.

steps.title: Your Journey to a Unique Piece
steps.1: Tell us about your dream piece — style, metal, gemstones, budget, and any inspiration images.
steps.2: Our designers create a custom sketch and 3D rendering for your approval.
steps.3: Our master jewelers handcraft your piece using the finest materials.
steps.4: Receive your one-of-a-kind piece with a care guide and warranty.

trust.title: Why Trust Us?
trust.eyebrow: We turn your vision into reality with expert craftsmanship and the finest materials.

fileUpload.sizeError: File size must be less than {size}MB
fileUpload.dragDropText: Drag & drop an image here, or click to browse

1.q: How long does the custom design process take?
1.a: The timeline depends on the complexity of your design. Typically, the process takes 2-4 weeks from consultation to delivery.

2.q: Can I provide my own gemstones?
2.a: Yes, we can incorporate your own gemstones into a custom design. Our experts will assess the stones and create a setting that showcases them beautifully.

3.q: What is the cost of a custom design?
3.a: The cost varies based on materials, complexity, and craftsmanship. We provide a detailed quote after the initial consultation.

4.q: Do you offer revisions to the design?
4.a: Absolutely. We work closely with you throughout the design process and offer revisions until you're completely satisfied with the design.
